title: salix × peasei
intro: Salix × peasei, also known as Pease's willow, is a hybrid of the weeping willow (Salix babylonica) and the white willow (Salix alba), resulting in a unique and versatile plant species. The bark and leaves of Salix × peasei contain salicin, a compound with analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a valuable medicinal resource. The health benefits of Salix × peasei include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved cardiovascular health, due to its ability to thin the blood and lower blood pressure. Salix × peasei can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
